name: Valiant Strike
look: A radiant golden crescent sweeps a full half-circle around the hero, trailing a banner-like ribbon of light, while a bright cross-gleam flashes at the centre and gold motes drift upward. Heroic, clean, warm.

name: Spirit Bolt
look: A cyan spirit-orb implodes to a pinpoint then erupts into a ghost-flame burst, throwing out curling wisp trails that fade like will-o'-the-wisps. Ethereal teal-white.

name: Iron Cleave
look: Two broad steel blade-arcs slash across each other in a hard X, throwing a horizontal ground-crack shock and a spray of bright sparks. Cold metallic blue-white.

name: Stone Bash
look: An overhead slam drives a heavy dust shock outward; jagged stone shards erupt from the ground in a ring and a brown debris cloud billows up. Earthy, weighty, screen-shaking.

name: Execute
look: A single massive vertical guillotine slash drops straight down with a crimson flash and a lingering blood-red X afterimage. Brutal, decisive, dark-red.

name: Tri-Shot
look: Three glowing emerald arrows fan outward in a wide spread, each leaving a fletched light-trail and bursting into a small green spark on the far edge. Quick and verdant.

name: Piercing Arrow
look: One long, thin azure lance-beam shoots out in a straight line, punching through everything with a white sonic ring at the muzzle and a sharp tapering streak. Precise, fast, icy-blue.

name: Mana Burst
look: Concentric sapphire mana-rings pulse outward while glowing rune-motes orbit and a soft core implodes then pops in a blue flash. Calm, magical, deep blue.

name: Arcane Nova
look: A huge violet supernova: a double expanding ring blasts out, two counter-rotating arcane sigils spin, and a starfield of magenta sparks scatters. The biggest, brightest cast — screen shakes.

name: Rapid Fire
look: Five staccato orange muzzle-flashes stamp out in a line, each spitting a bullet tracer streak and a curl of grey smoke. Rapid, punchy, hot orange-yellow.

name: Concussion Round
look: One heavy shell lands with a thick amber shockwave ring, a billow of grey smoke, and a ring of spinning stun-stars overhead. Concussive and dusty — screen shakes.

name: Shadow Curse
look: A dark pentacle hex-sigil blooms on the ground, purple glyphs orbit it, and creeping shadow tendrils claw outward before sinking away. Ominous, dim, violet-on-black.

name: True Strike
look: A blinding pure-white slash with no colour to it — a stark flash, golden filament lines converging to a single point, and one crisp expanding ring. Absolute, flawless, white-gold.

name: Void Palm
look: A black void-rift tears open with a glowing violet rim; cracks in space radiate outward, then the rift collapses to a point and snaps shut in a white reality-tear flash. The most dramatic cast.

name: Spirit Ball
look: Hurls a sphere of ki that bursts for area damage.

name: Dimensional Slash
look: A spirit-blade rift that cleaves a line of foes.

name: Three-Blade Iaido
look: A blinding draw-cut dealing heavy single-target damage.

name: Final Flash
look: A devastating beam that ignores all defenses (True damage).

name: Wave Fist
look: A charged energy wave washing over everything ahead.

name: Hollow Clash
look: Collides two opposing forces into one annihilating blast.

name: Serious Punch
look: One punch — colossal True damage to a single target.

name: Frag Toss
look: Lobs an explosive for a wide, hard-hitting blast.

name: Coup de Burst
look: A point-blank cannon shot with a huge area.

name: Petal Storm
look: A swirling storm of blades striking all nearby.

name: Great Eruption
look: Calls down a volcanic blast that burns the ground.

name: Explosion
look: A single, enormous magical detonation.

name: Double Skip
look: A skipping shot that bounces between many foes.

name: Chain Lightning
look: Forked lightning leaping across the lane.

name: Glacial Chain
look: Bouncing ice that freezes each target it touches.

name: Thunderbolt
look: A heavy bolt that stuns where it strikes.

name: Kirin
look: Summons a pillar of lightning for massive damage.

name: Bramble Burst
look: Thorns erupt, poisoning everything around the target.

name: Wildfire
look: Spreads fire that keeps burning across the wave.

name: Plague Cloud
look: A toxic cloud that poisons all who linger.

name: Inferno Snap
look: Instantly detonates all burns for a fiery payoff.

name: Black Rot
look: Spreading decay that amplifies damage to the rotten.

name: Tar Pit
look: Mires the lane, rooting and slowing all caught.

name: Shadow Stitch
look: Pins enemies' shadows, stunning a whole group.

name: Ice Geyser
look: A burst of ice that freezes a cluster solid.

name: Blizzard
look: A sustained snowstorm that deeply chills the field.

name: Sand Burial
look: Crushing sand that binds and grinds down foes.

name: Pep Talk
look: A rallying cry boosting all allied towers' attack.

name: Crescendo
look: A swelling tempo that hastens nearby allies.

name: Reject Fate
look: Shields and revitalizes wounded allies.

name: War Cry
look: An empowering roar — allies hit harder and faster.

name: Creation Rebirth
look: Restores allies and cleanses their afflictions.

name: Ironhide Slam
look: Hardens and slams the ground for area damage scaled by its armor.

name: Scaleguard Crash
look: A club-like forearm smashes the lane, fueled by its bulk.

name: Adamant Burst
look: Crystalline fists shatter outward for armor-scaled damage.

name: Armored Charge
look: Barrels through the front line, its plating turned to a weapon.

name: Fortress Smash
look: An earth-shaking blow whose force is drawn from its defenses.

name: Rapid Volley
look: Looses a flurry of arrows at the strongest foe in range.

name: Skipping Volley
look: A trick arrow that ricochets across a string of enemies.

name: Meteor Volley
look: Fires into the sky to rain a falling storm of arrows over an area.

name: Siege Bolt
look: A massive crossbow bolt that skewers through armor for heavy damage.

name: Plague Quiver
look: Empties a quiver of venom bolts, poisoning everything they strike.

name: Spin Shot
look: A whirling burst of trick shots peppering all nearby foes.

name: Grenade Barrage
look: Lobs a salvo of explosive shells that bloom into fire.

name: Phantom Fusillade
look: Curving rounds that rebound from foe to foe across the lane.

name: Bola Storm
look: A hail of weighted wire that tangles and slows a whole group.

name: Ruinous Passage
look: Scribes a killing verse, rotting all caught in the page's curse.

name: Errata Curse
look: Strikes a passage from reality — weakens and may stun a cluster.

name: Coronation Ward
look: Crowns the line in golden light, shielding and empowering allies.

name: Tempest Scepter
look: Unleashes a forking tempest that leaps between many foes.

name: Zap Nova
look: A crackling nova of sparks bursting over a small area.

name: Missile Salvo
look: Looses a volley of unerring arcane darts at a single target.

name: Sacred Renewal
look: Pours blessing over the whole line, healing and hastening allies.

name: Wolf Fang Fist
look: Rapid strikes that ramp up attack speed the longer it fights.

name: Spirit Sword
look: Conjured energy blade — attacks ignore a portion of armor.

name: Street Code
look: Gains attack when allies nearby are hurt.

name: Three-Sword Style
look: Three blades strike as one — bonus crit damage.

name: First Strike
look: The first hit on a fresh target always crits.

name: Royal Pride
look: Deals more damage to the strongest enemy in range.

name: Galick Surge
look: Periodic charged blast that pierces armor.

name: Perfect Form
look: Scales attack with its own missing health — fiercer when wounded.

name: Boundless Ki
look: Attack scales with skill power; spells hit harder.

name: Instinct
look: Chance to dodge an attacker's retaliation.

name: Second Wind
look: Heals a burst the first time it drops below half HP.

name: Infinity
look: A fraction of incoming damage is nullified.

name: Six Eyes
look: Greatly reduced skill mana cost; casts more often.

name: Domain
look: Nearby enemies take increased damage from all sources.

name: No Limiter
look: Removes its own attack cap at the cost of defense.

name: Deadpan
look: Immune to being slowed or stunned by enemy auras.

name: Casual Stride
look: Always acts unhurried — steady, unshakeable attack rhythm.

name: Loose Pin
look: Explosives have a chance to detonate twice.

name: Siege Payload
look: Bonus splash damage versus armored foes.

name: Cola Boost
look: Occasional super-charged shot with a huge blast.

name: Wide Bloom
look: Enlarged area of effect on every hit.

name: Fuse Master
look: Blasts also briefly slow everything they catch.

name: Eruption
look: Splash leaves a lingering burning patch.

name: Molten Core
look: Hits apply stacking burn to all caught enemies.

name: Aftershock
look: A second, smaller blast follows each shot.

name: Explosion Connoisseur
look: All damage is converted to area blasts.

name: Crimson Pride
look: Blast radius and damage grow as the wave goes on.

name: Overflow
look: Overkill damage splashes onto nearby enemies.

name: Bounce
look: Attacks ricochet to an extra enemy.

name: Conduit
look: Each bounce loses less damage.

name: Thunderclap
look: The final bounce briefly stuns.

name: Cold Snap
look: Chained targets are chilled and slowed.

name: Ricochet
look: Can bounce back to a target already hit.

name: Godspeed
look: Lightning-fast attacks with extra chain range.

name: Whirlwind
look: Bounces form a spinning arc, hitting clusters harder.

name: Assassin's Instinct
look: Bonus damage to the lowest-health bounce target.

name: Mirror Eye
look: Copies and predicts foes — bounces never miss.

name: Lightning Stream
look: A continuous arc that keeps chaining while channeling.

name: Vengeance
look: Gains attack each time an ally tower is disabled.

name: Barbs
look: Attacks plant thorns that bleed over time.

name: Smolder
look: Damage-over-time ticks faster.

name: Foxfire
look: Burns spread to a nearby enemy on death.

name: Virulence
look: Poison stacks more potent on the same target.

name: Lingering Toxin
look: Damage-over-time lasts noticeably longer.

name: Ignition
look: Refreshing a burn deals an instant flare of damage.

name: Pinpoint Flame
look: Critical hits double the applied burn.

name: Ambition
look: Power grows for every enemy currently afflicted by it.

name: Corrosion
look: Its damage-over-time also shreds armor.

name: Epidemic
look: Killing a poisoned enemy spreads the poison.

name: Necrosis
look: Afflicted enemies take increased damage from everyone.

name: Sticky Mud
look: Slowed enemies are also rooted briefly.

name: Shadow Bind
look: Chance to fully bind (stun) on hit.

name: 200 IQ
look: Targets the most dangerous enemy and amplifies its debuff.

name: Ice-Make
look: Builds icy terrain that slows everything that crosses it.

name: Freezing Touch
look: Stacks chill until the target freezes solid.

name: Deep Chill
look: Slows are stronger and resist tenacity.

name: Hoarfrost
look: Frozen enemies take bonus damage.

name: Absolute Zero
look: Periodically flash-freezes everything in range.

name: Sand Armor
look: Heavily armored — shrugs off enemy attacks while it debuffs.

name: Iron Grip
look: Debuffs cannot be cleansed by enemy healers.

name: Tailed Rage
look: The longer it lives, the harsher its debuffs.

name: Cheer
look: Boosts the attack of nearby allied towers.

name: Allegro
look: Boosts the attack speed of nearby allies.

name: Blessing
look: Slowly heals nearby allied towers.

name: Shun Shield
look: Grants a brief shield to a low-health ally.

name: Rally
look: Aura strengthens as more allies stand nearby.

name: Vanguard
look: Allies near it take reduced damage.

name: Last Charge
look: On death, leaves a powerful farewell buff to allies.

name: Hundred Healings
look: Its healing scales with skill power and never overheals to waste.

name: Monster Strength
look: Massive raw power that also lifts allied attack.

name: Sage's Resolve
look: Veteran poise — auras persist briefly even after it falls.

name: Ironhide
look: Hardens its body — part of its armor is folded into its skill damage.

name: Guts
look: Refuses to fall; survives a lethal blow at 1 HP once per battle.

name: Iron Scales
look: Metal scales turn a share of its bulk into retaliating force.

name: Counter Stance
look: Answers each blow it tanks with a punishing strike.

name: Diamond Body
look: Crystalline skin reflects a portion of melee damage back.

name: Unbreakable
look: The more armor it stacks, the harder its skill strikes.

name: Plated Hide
look: Layered plating soaks hits and stores them as power.

name: Bulwark
look: Stands as a wall — nearby allies take reduced damage.

name: Last Bastion
look: Grows mightier as its own health drops.

name: Indomitable
look: Cannot be stunned while above half health.

name: Symbol of Defense
look: Its mere presence steels every ally's resolve.

name: Quick Draw
look: Looses arrows in a rapid rhythm — faster the longer it fires.

name: Keen Eye
look: Never wastes a shot — bonus crit against the same target.

name: Trick Shot
look: Angles every loose so arrows skip onward after a hit.

name: Far Sight
look: Extreme reach — strikes the lane long before others can.

name: Arcing Loose
look: Lofts shafts over cover to rain down on a wide area.

name: Last Shot
look: Each volley is offered like a final arrow — extra armor pierce.

name: Armor Piercer
look: Heavy bolts punch clean through plate, ignoring much armor.

name: Steady Aim
look: A slow, deliberate draw — every bolt lands for heavy damage.

name: Envenom
look: Coats each bolt in slow rot — hits seed a lingering poison.

name: Barbed Bolt
look: Hooked heads tear on impact, deepening the venom's bite.

name: Gun Kata
look: A flowing shooting form — chains rapid trick shots together.

name: Fan the Hammer
look: Empties the cylinder in a blur of point-blank rounds.

name: Incendiary Rounds
look: Shells burst into fire, scorching the ground they land on.

name: Wide Blast
look: Over-charged charges detonate across a larger radius.

name: High Ground
look: Fires from a vantage — bonus damage to distant foes.

name: Homing Rounds
look: Will-guided bullets curve around cover to find their mark.

name: Perfect Cadence
look: An unbroken firing rhythm that ramps damage as it sustains.

name: Weighted Net
look: Bolas and wire tangle struck foes, slowing their advance.

name: Pinning Throw
look: A precise hail of blades that staggers grouped enemies.

name: Festering Script
look: Inked hexes rot the target over time, scaling with skill power.

name: Spreading Curse
look: The decay leaps to nearby foes as the page is finished.

name: Weakening Word
look: Strikes out an enemy's strength — slows and softens them.

name: Ink Shackle
look: Binding script seizes a target, with a chance to stun.

name: Royal Decree
look: Commands the field — boosts the attack of every nearby ally.

name: Aegis Blessing
look: Wards allies so the first blow against them is turned aside.

name: Dawn's Favor
look: Radiant light quickens allied strikes across the aura.

name: Arc Conduct
look: Lets the lightning choose its path, leaping between foes.

name: Storm Link
look: Each chained target takes more as the storm builds.

name: Static Burst
look: Sparks scatter on impact, zapping a small cluster.

name: Spark Scatter
look: Wild discharge spreads the shock to extra nearby enemies.

name: Arcane Focus
look: Channels raw magic into unerring, armor-piercing darts.

name: Mana Bolt
look: Converts surplus mana into bonus bolt damage on hit.

name: True Aim
look: Darts never miss — bonus crit against full-health targets.

name: Benediction
look: A standing blessing that raises all nearby allies' power.

name: Goddess Favor
look: Sacred grace hastens every ally caught in the halo.

name: Purify
look: Cleanses afflictions from allies within the orb's light.
